exam_name: NEBOSH International Diploma in Occupational Health and Safety
exam_format: Open Book Examination (OBE) — scenario-based written paper plus practical workplace assessment
exam_price_notes: Fee set by ALP. Typically £2,000–£5,000 all-in. International version of the National Diploma.

testing_centers.notes: Exams delivered by NEBOSH Accredited Learning Partners (ALPs) globally. Open Book Examinations (OBE) are typically taken remotely or at the ALP venue. Practical assessments are conducted in the learner's own workplace.

id_requirements: Valid government-issued photo ID required. Name must match NEBOSH registration. Requirements confirmed by the delivering ALP.
exam_rules: Open Book Examination (OBE): all learning materials and resources may be used. Candidates must work independently without assistance from tutors or peers. Responses must be in the candidate's own words; plagiarism is a breach of NEBOSH policy. A 24-hour window is given to complete the OBE task paper.
renewal_options: NEBOSH certificates do not expire. However, NEBOSH recommends CPD to maintain and update knowledge. Many employers and professional bodies (e.g., IOSH) require evidence of ongoing CPD.

prerequisites.description: NEBOSH IGC or equivalent health and safety qualification strongly recommended.

retake_policy.notes: Candidates who refer (fail) may resit at the next available examination sitting. Full exam fee required for resit. No limit on number of attempts.

domains.name: Unit IB: Hazardous Agents in the Workplace
Unit IC: Workplace and Work Equipment Safety

official_study_resources.title: NEBOSH Study Materials (via Accredited Learning Partners)
official_study_resources.notes: Official course materials are provided by Accredited Learning Partners. NEBOSH also publishes free student support resources including specimen papers and guidance documents at nebosh.org.uk.

aliases: nebosh international diploma in occupational health and safety
